summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All hydrated PRs are open, non-security-sensitive, and better handled as independent maintainer/backlog review items rather than closure candidates. Five listed PRs were not present in the compacted preflight artifact, so they are classified non-mutatingly with null live timestamps.
